name: uderia-slack
description: Slack workspace integration. Provides list_channels, get_messages, send_message, search_messages, and list_users tools. Requires user Slack workspace connection.

tool_schemas.name: list_channels
tool_schemas.description: List public channels in the connected Slack workspace.

arguments.name: max_results
arguments.description: Maximum number of channels to return (default: 50, max: 200).

arguments.name: include_private
arguments.description: Include private channels the bot is a member of. Default: false.

tool_schemas.name: get_messages
tool_schemas.description: Get recent messages from a Slack channel.

tool_schemas.name: send_message
tool_schemas.description: Post a message to a Slack channel or thread.

arguments.name: message
arguments.description: Message text to send. Supports Slack mrkdwn formatting.

tool_schemas.name: search_messages
tool_schemas.description: Search messages across the Slack workspace.

arguments.name: query
arguments.description: Search query. Supports Slack modifiers (in:#channel, from:@user, etc.).

tool_schemas.name: list_users
tool_schemas.description: List members of the connected Slack workspace.

SLACK_CLIENT_ID.label: Slack App Client ID
SLACK_CLIENT_ID.description: Client ID from your Slack App's Basic Information page (api.slack.com/apps → your app → Basic Information → App Credentials).

SLACK_CLIENT_SECRET.label: Slack App Client Secret
SLACK_CLIENT_SECRET.description: Client Secret from your Slack App's Basic Information page.

auth_schema.description: Connect your Slack workspace to enable channel and messaging tools.
